algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived exterior egress door landing clearance
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: clinic door swing and access-control coordination. The optimizer uses fixed source-grounded code semantics while tuning visible design parameters and public scenario-model trade-offs.

scenario_facts.ncarb_scenario_theme: clinic door swing and access-control coordination

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.

source_task_origin.ncarb_scenario_theme: clinic door swing and access-control coordination
